verse_text: 'And whenever you stand praying, if you have anything against anyone, forgive him, that your Father in heaven may also forgive you your trespasses.

links.context: Peace with other believers is a requirement for worship ([[MRK.11:25]]). The liturgical "kiss of peace" at the beginning of the eucharistic prayer is a sign of reconciliation and forgiveness, preparing the faithful to offer the holy gifts at the altar ([[1CO.16:20]]; 1Pt 5:14).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
